channel.title: QuizBuffet — Free Certification Practice Tests
channel.description: Free, no-account practice tests for IT, cybersecurity, cloud, healthcare, trades, and finance certifications. New cert content and exam-prep updates as they go live.

item.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Associate (SAA-C03) — 600 free practice questions
item.description: The most popular cloud certification for designing AWS workloads 600 questions across 4 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) — 400 free practice questions
item.description: Foundational AWS knowledge for technical and non-technical professionals 400 questions across 4 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301) — 800 free practice questions
item.description: The industry-standard entry into network engineering careers 800 questions across 6 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA Data+ (DA0-002) — 1000 free practice questions
item.description: Data acquisition, analysis, and governance for data-driven decision making 1000 questions across 5 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701) — 1900 free practice questions
item.description: Core security skills for IT professionals defending enterprise environments 1900 questions across 5 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA Network+ (N10-009) — 1119 free practice questions
item.description: Core networking skills for IT infrastructure professionals 1119 questions across 5 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA A+ Core 2 (220-1202) — 3200 free practice questions
item.description: Operating systems, security, and troubleshooting for IT support technicians 3200 questions across 4 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA A+ Core 1 (220-1101) — 2100 free practice questions
item.description: Hardware, networking, and troubleshooting for IT support technicians 2100 questions across 5 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA PenTest+ (PT0-003) — 2160 free practice questions
item.description: Penetration testing and vulnerability management for security professionals 2160 questions across 5 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA CySA+ (CS0-003) — 1600 free practice questions
item.description: Threat detection and incident response for security analysts 1600 questions across 4 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA ITF+ (FC0-U61) — 1900 free practice questions
item.description: IT fundamentals for beginners and career changers 1900 questions across 6 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: CompTIA Cloud+ (CV0-004) — 1200 free practice questions
item.description: Cloud infrastructure skills for engineers and sysadmins 1200 questions across 6 domains. Free, no account needed.

item.title: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900) (AZ-900) — coming soon
item.description: Foundational Azure knowledge for cloud beginners and decision-makers Free practice test in development (priority #1).

item.title: Microsoft Azure Administrator Associate (AZ-104) (AZ-104) — coming soon
item.description: Day-to-day Azure infrastructure administration skills Free practice test in development (priority #2).

item.title: ISC2 CISSP (CISSP) — coming soon
item.description: The gold-standard senior cybersecurity certification Free practice test in development (priority #3).

item.title: ITIL 4 Foundation (ITIL 4) — coming soon
item.description: The most widely adopted IT service management framework Free practice test in development (priority #4).

item.title: OSHA 10-Hour Construction (OSHA 10) — coming soon
item.description: Required entry-level safety training for construction workers Free practice test in development (priority #5).

item.title: OSHA 30-Hour Construction (OSHA 30) — coming soon
item.description: Supervisor-level construction safety certification Free practice test in development (priority #6).

item.title: Forklift Operator Certification (OSHA 1910.178) — coming soon
item.description: Required certification for operating powered industrial trucks Free practice test in development (priority #7).

item.title: CPR / AED Certification (CPR/AED) — coming soon
item.description: Lifesaving cardiac and breathing emergency skills Free practice test in development (priority #8).

item.title: Basic Life Support (BLS) (BLS) — coming soon
item.description: Required CPR-level credential for healthcare professionals Free practice test in development (priority #9).

item.title: EMT (Emergency Medical Technician) (NREMT) — coming soon
item.description: Entry-level certification for emergency medical services Free practice test in development (priority #10).
